title: Stir-Fried Noodle Salad with Caramelized Onion
description: A fusion of Chinese flavors with a twist of caramelized onion and venezuelan influence. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Cook rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a pan, heat vegetable oil over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add soy sauce and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add caramelized onion and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add mixed salad greens and cook until wilted.
Add cooked noodles to the pan and toss everything together.
Top with crumbled venezuelan cheese and sesame seeds.
